title: Formula PRO New feature alert: Synchronizing Current and Future Updates Between Multiple Boards
excerpt: Now you can automatically duplicate items from a one board to another board and ensure all future updates on the first board item are seamlessly synced with the corresponding board item. This is powered by four new recip…

posts.author: hellotimi (David Kalu (Formula Pro - Use formula column results in automations!))
posts.cookedHtml:
Now you can automatically duplicate items from a one board to another board and ensure all future updates on the first board item are seamlessly synced with the corresponding board item. This is powered by four new recipes added to Formula PRO.

Screenshot 2025-01-02 at 15.56.032502×1402 141 KB

Screenshot 2025-01-04 at 07.32.592212×820 32.5 KB

You can get Formula PRO from the app marketplace from here
